title: medicago polymorpha var. ciliaris
intro: Medicago polymorpha var. ciliaris, also known as French clover or Persian clover, is a perennial legume native to the Old World and is widely cultivated for its medicinal and nutritional properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Medicago polymorpha var. ciliaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and improve bone health. In herbal preparations, Medicago polymorpha var. ciliaris can be consumed as a tea, added to food or supplements, or used topically in creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
